Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class Claim.ClaimCost

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.Claim.ClaimCost
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Claim.ClaimEntry
Enclosing class:
Claim
public static class Claim.ClaimCost extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the cost details of a claim.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    BigDecimal
    adjustment
    Amount the charge was decreased by payer adjustment.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ClaimCost()
    Create a new instance with all costs set to zero.
    ClaimCost(Claim.ClaimCost other)
    Create a new instance with the same cost values as the supplied instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addCosts(Claim.ClaimCost other)
    Add the costs from the other entry to this one.
    BigDecimal
    getCoinsurancePaid()
    Returns the amount of coinsurance paid by the patient, either via secondary insurance or out of pocket.
    BigDecimal
    getCopayPaid()
    Returns the total copay paid by the patient.
    BigDecimal
    getCoveredCost()
    Returns the total cost covered by the payer, which includes coinsurance and any amounts paid by the secondary payer.
    BigDecimal
    getDeductiblePaid()
    Returns the total deductible paid by the patient.
    BigDecimal
    getPatientCost()
    Returns the total cost paid by the patient, which includes out-of-pocket expenses, copay, and deductible.
    BigDecimal
    getTotalClaimCost()
    Returns the total cost of the Claim, including immunizations/procedures tied to the encounter.
    void
    reset()
    Reset all claim costs to zero.

    • ClaimCost

      public ClaimCost()
      Create a new instance with all costs set to zero.

    • ClaimCost

      Create a new instance with the same cost values as the supplied instance.

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Reset all claim costs to zero.

    • addCosts

      public void addCosts(Claim.ClaimCost other)
      Add the costs from the other entry to this one.
      Parameters:
      other - the other claim entry.

    • getCoinsurancePaid

      public BigDecimal getCoinsurancePaid()
      Returns the amount of coinsurance paid by the patient, either via secondary insurance or out of pocket.
      Returns:
      the amount of coinsurance paid

    • getTotalClaimCost

      public BigDecimal getTotalClaimCost()
      Returns the total cost of the Claim, including immunizations/procedures tied to the encounter.
      Returns:
      the total claim cost

    • getCoveredCost

      public BigDecimal getCoveredCost()
      Returns the total cost covered by the payer, which includes coinsurance and any amounts paid by the secondary payer.
      Returns:
      the cost covered by the payer.

    • getDeductiblePaid

      public BigDecimal getDeductiblePaid()
      Returns the total deductible paid by the patient.
      Returns:
      the deductible paid by the patient.

    • getCopayPaid

      public BigDecimal getCopayPaid()
      Returns the total copay paid by the patient.
      Returns:
      the copay paid by the patient.

    • getPatientCost

      public BigDecimal getPatientCost()
      Returns the total cost paid by the patient, which includes out-of-pocket expenses, copay, and deductible.
      Returns:
      the total cost paid by the patient.
